message:
test(workflows): add metadata/event/classify tests for 4 untested handlers

Add 37 unit tests covering Workflow trait metadata and event filtering
for handlers that previously had zero trait-level test coverage:

- HandleProcessTriageLifecycle (7 tests): metadata, step names,
  event_type/rule_id matching, trigger types, rejection
- HandleAuthRequired (7 tests): metadata, steps, auth event handling,
  rejection, agent types, cooldown config
- HandleClaudeCodeLimits (10 tests): metadata, steps, agent-scoped
  event matching, agent rejection, cooldown, classify_limit (3 variants)
- HandleGeminiQuota (10 tests): metadata, steps, agent-scoped event
  matching, agent rejection, cooldown, classify_quota (3 variants)

All handlers now have trait-level coverage. Combined with the previous
commit, all 8 workflow handlers have unit tests.

Build: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-tansummit-target --no-default-features
All 70 handler tests pass (0.01s).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
